backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages two in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections with timestamp-based sorting for announcements.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single completed change: updating the anchor text in Footer.tsx to 'Dollars.ai', with associated component dependencies and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, styling, and notable content changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest and icon links, service worker registration script, and the React root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and Urdu language setting.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for same-origin GET requests, skipping API calls and providing an offline fallback to index.html.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, wiring form state to backend mutation hooks with confirmation dialogs and loading indicators.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Card component that renders a single announcement with a nanosecond-to-date formatted timestamp, title, body excerpt, and a hover-revealed 'Read More' indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, social media links (X, Discord, WhatsApp, YouTube, Instagram), quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the Legend X Esports title/tagline, CTA buttons linking to roster and about sections, and key stats.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA button, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of announcement cards fetched via the useAnnouncements hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, falling back to a default avatar image on error.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the roster/team section of the landing page, fetching members via `useRoster` and displaying loading skeletons, error, empty, or a grid of `PlayerCard` components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via `@dfinity/auth-client`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for the dark esports color theme, and custom glow/text-shadow utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and feature state for the Dollars.ai project, recording completed features, schema version, and build configuration flags.
